name: @kerf/core
description: Kerf W1: Blackboard Layer A + Projections API + Permission Provider

scripts.demo:w1-queue: npm run demo:w1-queue:esbuild && node -e "console.log('Built src/examples/w1-decision-queue-demo.bundle.js \u2014 open src/examples/w1-decision-queue-demo.html in a browser.')"
scripts.demo:w1-queue:serve:
npm run demo:w1-queue:esbuild && node -e "console.log('
Kerf W1 demo: http://localhost:8000/examples/w1-decision-queue-demo.html
(static server; no auth, no fetch, no backend writes; Ctrl-C to stop)
')" && python3 -m http.server 8000 --directory src
scripts.demo:v15-vertical-slice: npm run demo:v15-vertical-slice:esbuild && node -e "console.log('Built src/examples/v15-vertical-slice/app.bundle.js — use demo:v15-vertical-slice:serve (e.g. http://localhost:8010/field-capture).')"
scripts.demo:v15-vertical-slice:serve: npm run demo:v15-vertical-slice:esbuild && node --import tsx scripts/serve-v15-vertical-slice.ts
scripts.demo:audit-f37: npm run demo:audit-f37:esbuild && node -e "console.log('Built src/examples/audit-f37/audit-f37-demo.bundle.js — use demo:audit-f37:serve for /audit/<packetId>.')"
scripts.demo:field-capture:esbuild: npx --yes esbuild@0.25.0 src/examples/field-capture-app.ts --bundle --platform=browser --format=iife --outfile=src/field-capture/field-capture.bundle.js && npx --yes esbuild@0.25.0 src/examples/transcript-review-app.ts --bundle --platform=browser --format=iife --outfile=src/transcript-review/transcript-review.bundle.js
scripts.demo:field-capture: npm run demo:field-capture:esbuild && node -e "console.log('Built field-capture + transcript-review bundles. Serve from src: python3 -m http.server 8000 --directory src  then open http://localhost:8000/field-capture/')"
scripts.demo:field-capture:serve:
npm run demo:field-capture:esbuild && node -e "console.log('
F·33 Field capture: http://localhost:8000/field-capture/
Transcript review: http://localhost:8000/transcript-review/
(static server from src/; Ctrl-C to stop)
')" && python3 -m http.server 8000 --directory src
scripts.test-fixtures:validate: tsx -e "import('./src/test-fixtures/index.js').then(m => { const events = m.seedWorld(); console.log('seed produced', events.length, 'events'); })"
scripts.serve:shell: npm run build:astro && node --import tsx scripts/serve-kerf-shell.ts
